systems.name: Epistemic Capability / Epistemic Claim Gap
systems.description: Dual-axis framework for comparing observable behavior with model self-claims about knowledge boundaries.

systems.name: Adaptive Behavioral Scoring
systems.description: Restricted-access output-layer behavioral deformation scoring framework.

systems.name: Behavioral Response Classification
systems.description: Eight-class taxonomy for observable response-pattern classification.

systems.name: Evaluation Protocols as Behavioral Environments
systems.description: Framing that evaluation sequences can shape the behavior they appear to measure.

systems.name: Interaction Ecology Framework
systems.description: Framework for long-context human-model interaction as an ecology of prompts, memory, protocols, behavior, and feedback.

systems.name: Dynamic Rule Spectrum System
systems.description: Methodological line for analyzing dynamic rule pressure and interaction-induced constraint effects.

systems.name: Cross-Model Structural Drift
systems.description: Pilot evidence line on convergence toward stable response structures under repeated or structured interaction pressure.

systems.name: Cross-Model Behavioral Scoring Dataset
systems.description: Dataset for evaluator identity, directive framing, and cross-model behavioral scoring research.

systems.name: Medical AI Structured-Illusion Audit Dataset
systems.description: Applied structured behavioral audit dataset for medical AI hallucination research.

systems.name: Pilot Dataset Summary
systems.description: Pilot dataset summary for model self-report reliability research.

systems.name: Generative Behavior Science Framework
systems.description: Operational measurement layer for GEO path-attraction dynamics. Public description should stay high-level.

systems.name: Interaction Field Cybernetics Engine
systems.description: Runtime engine for sensing and recycling interaction-field states. Public claim limited to sandbox-level detection and candidate intervention generation.

systems.name: Interaction-Induced Distribution Field System
systems.description: Integrated prototype combining interaction-field sensing, public-safe priors, sandbox validation, and governance-state monitoring.

systems.name: Multi-Turn State Tracking
systems.description: Private behavioral observation layer for multi-turn interaction-state changes.

systems.name: ValidationBridge v3
systems.description: Validation bridge mapping observations into governance checks and adaptive probe planning.

systems.name: Integrated Governance System
systems.description: Governance loop connecting behavioral observations and validation results.

systems.name: Governance Validation and Observation System
systems.description: Validation-governance system family for probes, planning, memory, and routing.

systems.name: Interaction Initialization and Perturbation System
systems.description: Private interaction-initialization and perturbation system. Do not publish mechanisms, triggers, or coupling logic.

systems.name: Experiment Control and Recycle Loop
systems.description: Internal experiment-control loop. Public references must remain high-level.

systems.name: Strategic Direction Mapping Layer
systems.description: Private strategic mapping layer. Public use limited to sanitized domain-general statements.
